data.body: E5 CODE COMPLETE (commit fd94e4b1, on main). bridge-status -> rebar._engine_support.bridge; purge-bridge -> rebar._commands.purge_bridge; routed via rebar._cli (auto-init full unless TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR set). Byte-parity dual-run tests test_e5_{bridge_status,purge_bridge}.py (10) green; full interfaces tier 469 passed. One documented divergence in purge: git commit-summary chatter suppressed (bash ran git commit w/o -q), matching E3 delete. NOT CLOSED: the LIVE-DIG Jira close-gate (per lad-cipher-arena standing gate) is satisfied jointly with E5b via one combined live DIG probe; pausing for user go-ahead before first live DIG write.
